info.title: Pricore API
info.description: REST API for managing a Pricore registry: organizations, repositories, packages, members, mirrors, and access tokens. Authenticate with a personal or organization access token sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

message.example: This invitation has already been accepted.

get.summary: List organizations accessible to the authenticated token

post.summary: Create a new organization owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: List the organizations the authenticated user belongs to

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
